falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if SGP foreign-born share is at least 20pp above the comparator panel mean AND SGP per-capita growth exceeds comparator mean by at least 1pp annualised over 1990-2023, with the migration channel accounting for at least 25% of the per-capita growth gap in decomposition.
